raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Set the scene","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Lets Test set context before anything more specific lands.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Switching cost","name":"Where is the context switching hitting you hardest right now?","description":"Surfaces the specific part of the load that is hardest to absorb.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Noise source","name":"What keeps pulling you out of flow most often?","description":"Finds the main interrupt pattern behind the churn.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority tradeoff","name":"What are you choosing not to do this cycle?","description":"Forces the hidden trade-off behind current priorities.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision support","name":"Where do you need faster calls from me?","description":"Surfaces where manager support would reduce churn or unblock progress.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Update quality","name":"What part of your updates is hardest to keep crisp when things are moving?","description":"Checks how communication holds up under shifting priorities and stakeholder pressure.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder churn","name":"Which stakeholder loop is creating the most rework for you?","description":"Identifies where cross-functional churn is costing time and attention.","purpose":"competency","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Air cover","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel more protected?","description":"Finds the concrete support that would reduce friction without opening a new agenda.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next move","name":"What's the first thing you want to get under control before our next check-in?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete next step.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
